name: Multiple Login Failures for Single Username
notes: Reports authentication failures for the same username
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following application misconfiguration issue - DB -BDF
when at least 4 events are seen with the same Username in 3 minutes
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
thresholds: when at least 4 events are seen with the same Username in 3 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Multiple Login Failures for Single Username on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following application misconfiguration issue - DB -BDF
AND when at least 4 events are seen with the same Username in 3 minutes
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Login Failures for the Same User
Event description: Detected multiple (10) authentication failures for the same user name in a 5 minute period.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
